description:
A support ticket about a printer network connectivity issue was accidentally submitted to the wrong department mailbox. In FreeScout (http://localhost:8080), move the conversation with the subject "Printer cannot connect to network after office move" from the "General Inquiries" mailbox to the "IT Network Support" mailbox.

Login credentials:
- Email: admin@helpdesk.local
- Password: Admin123!

metadata.expected_subject: Printer cannot connect to network after office move
